items.title: NASA Eyes Boeing-Lockheed Rocket Component For Moon Mission As Costs Skyrocket: Report
items.description: NASA seeks rocket components from Boeing and Lockheed Martin's ULA joint venture amid delays and cost issues.

items.title: CNBC Daily Open: China sets lowest growth target in decades
items.description: That target at 4.5% to 5% marks a downgrade from the “around 5%” set in the past three years.

items.title: China to boost defense spending by 7%, slowest pace since 2021
items.description: Beijing's planned military budget comes amid escalating conflict in the Middle East and persistent tensions over Taiwan.

items.title: The U.S. insists the Iran conflict won't be a 'forever war.' Experts beg to differ
items.description: President Trump and his officials say the war won't be protracted. Experts say it could go on longer than the White House expects.

items.title: NASA’s Starliner Mishap Findings Deepen the Governance And Culture Story Around Boeing’s (BA) Crewed-Space Program
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the best space stocks to buy now, despite the fact that it’s in rough waters. On February 19, NASA released findings from its investigation into the Starliner Crewed Flight Test. In that release, NASA formally declared the mission a Type A mishap and said leadership accountability would follow, […]
